ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the test record */,
  "cumulative_total" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of tests performed */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the tests were conducted */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for tests performed */,
  "testing_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of testing conducted */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL source of the data */,
  "source_label" TEXT /* Label of the source providing the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the record */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases from the tests */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate of confirmed cases */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate of confirmed cases */,
  "testing_facility" TEXT /* Testing facility where the tests were conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_testing_data_testing_facility FOREIGN KEY ("testing_facility") REFERENCES testing_facilities ("facility_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_testing_data_source_url FOREIGN KEY ("source_url") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_url"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_testing_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_testing_data_testing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("testing_type_id") REFERENCES testing_types ("testing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_types" (
  "testing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing type (e.g., PCR, non-PCR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing type */,
  "accuracy_rate" REAL /* Accuracy rate of the testing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for inquiries regarding the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Eastern Europe, North America) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's significance */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region within the main region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregated_testing_data" (
  "aggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregation record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country related to the aggregation */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period for the aggregation (e.g., last week, last month) */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted in the specified period */,
  "average_tests_per_day" REAL /* Average number of tests conducted per day during the period */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Positive rate of tests during the period */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate of confirmed cases during the period */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate of confirmed cases during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregated_testing_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES covid_testing_data ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of testing facility (e.g., hospital, laboratory) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the testing facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health measure */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country implementing the measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the public health measure */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the measure was implemented */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the measure in controlling the pandemic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_measures_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the vaccination took place */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  "number_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
